member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioInstrumentTuner
member.summary: Musical Note Detector (Tuner) Uses AMDF (Average Magnitude Difference Function) with Parabolic Interpolation for accurate pitch.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioLevels
member.summary: Frequency band level visualizer (ULTRA LOW CPU: peak detection with simple heuristics) Uses 3-band crossover filters (Low/Mid/High) for accurate separation

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioLevelsPeak
member.summary: ABSOLUTE LOWEST CPU: Instant peak + decay (like cheap LED meters) Uses 3-band crossover filters. Displays PEAK instead of Average energy.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioLevelsVU
member.summary: Analog-style VU meter (classic ballistics with filter bank) Uses 3-band crossover for frequency separation.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioMetronome
member.summary: Metronome - Pulses at a set BPM and shows how well drummer matches the beat

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioMusicBPMDetector
member.summary: Music BPM Detector - Detects BPM from music (not just drums) Uses autocorrelation for tempo detection in musical tracks

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioOscillograph
member.summary: Waveform oscillograph visualizer (ZERO allocations, perfect sync)

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioRecorder.GainFactor
member.summary: Gain multiplier applied to raw PCM when UseGain is true.

member.name: M:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioRecorder.AmplifyPcm16(System.Byte[],System.Single)
member.summary: Amplifies PCM16 audio data in-place. Zero allocations.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioRhythmDetector
member.summary: Rhythm Detector (BPM/Tempo Detector for drummers) Detects beats and calculates BPM using onset detection

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioSoundBars
member.summary: High-resolution frequency spectrum sound bars (music player style). Uses Goertzel algorithm to compute energy at logarithmically-spaced frequency bins. Bars with energy are ON, bars without are fully OFF, creating an organic pattern of active/silent frequency clusters. ZERO render allocations, double-buffered.

member.name: F:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioSoundBars.ReleaseCoeffPerSec
member.summary: Bar release: fraction remaining per second. ~10% left after ~0.2 s.

member.name: F:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioSoundBars.PeakDecayPerSec
member.summary: Peak hold decay: fraction remaining per second. ~15% left after 1 s → dots gone in ~1.7 s.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Audio.AudioWaveformBars
member.summary: Scrolling waveform bars visualizer (music player style, like SoundCloud/Spotify). Displays many thin vertical bars growing symmetrically from center. New audio scrolls in from the right, older bars fade on the left. ZERO allocations during render, double-buffered.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Effects.GlassBackdropEffect
member.summary: Glass backdrop effect with customizable corner radius. Applies a liquid glass shader effect that respects rounded corners.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Effects.GlassBackdropEffect.CornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the corner radius in points (density-independent units). The shader will automatically convert this to pixels based on screen density.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Effects.GlassBackdropEffect.GlassDepth
member.summary: Gets or sets the 3D depth/emboss intensity of the glass effect. Controls the refraction strength for the curved appearance. Range: 0.0 (flat/no distortion) to 2.0+ (very pronounced). Default: 1.0.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Effects.GlassBackdropEffect.BlurStrength
member.summary: Gets or sets the blur intensity multiplier for the frosted glass effect. Default: 1.0 (original appearance).

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Effects.GlassBackdropEffect.GlassOpacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the overall glass panel opacity. Range: 0.0 (fully transparent) to 1.0 (fully opaque). Default: 0.75.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Effects.GlassBackdropEffect.GlassColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the glass tint color. The alpha channel controls tint strength: fully transparent = no tint, fully opaque = solid color overlay. Default: Transparent (no tint).

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.ColorResourceNotFoundException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a color resource cannot be found in the application resources.

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorResourceNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of ColorResourceNotFoundException.
member.param: The key of the color resource that was not found.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.ColorResourceNotFoundException.ColorKey
member.summary: Gets the key of the color resource that was not found.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.AppColors
member.summary: Auto-generated fluent helper class for accessing color resources from Colors.xaml

member.name: T:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions
member.summary: Fluent extension methods for working with colors

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.WithAlpha(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new color with the specified alpha/opacity value (0.0 to 1.0)

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.WithOpacity(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new color with the specified opacity percentage (0 to 100)

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.Lighten(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a lighter version of the color

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.Darken(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a darker version of the color

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.ToHex(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color)
member.summary: Converts the color to a hex string (e.g., #FF5733)

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.ToHexWithAlpha(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color)
member.summary: Converts the color to a hex string with alpha (e.g., #FF5733AA)

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.FromHex(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Color from a hex string. Supports formats: #RGB, #RRGGBB, #AARRGGBB, RGB, RRGGBB, AARRGGBB
member.param: Hex color string with or without #

member.name: M:MusicNotes.ColorExtensions.FromHexRGBA(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Color from RGBA hex string. Supports formats: #RRGGBBAA, RRGGBBAA
member.param: RGBA hex color string with or without #

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.AboutApp
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to About.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnCancel
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cancel.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnClose
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Close.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnConnect
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Connect.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnCreate
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Create.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnReset
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Reset.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnSave
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Save.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnStart
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Start.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.BtnStop
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Stop.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.MarkdownTest
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to In the soon-coming __SkiaSharp__ release we could generate tagged PDF containing links and much more!.. To update the device software, follow these steps: 1. Download the new version of the software from the website [supadupa.com](https://google.com). 2. Copy the firmware file in `HEX` format corresponding to your device model to the root directory of the memory card. 3. Insert the memory card into the device when it is turned off. 4. While holding the `Mode` button, connect the device to power v [rest of string was truncated]";.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.No
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.Off
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Off.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.On
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to On.

member.name: P:MusicNotes.Resources.Strings.ResStrings.Yes
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Yes.

member.name: M:MusicNotes.UI.AudioPage.Build
member.summary: This will be called by HotReload

member.name: T:MusicNotes.UI.IAudioVisualizer
member.summary: Interface for audio visualizers

member.name: M:MusicNotes.UI.IAudioVisualizer.Render(SkiaSharp.SKCanvas,SkiaSharp.SKRect,System.Single)
member.summary: Renders into a viewport (in pixels) on the provided canvas. Visualizers should respect viewport offset/size and not assume (0,0). Returns true if the visualizer still has animation in progress (e.g. decaying bars or falling peak dots) and needs another redraw even without new audio data.

member.name: M:MusicNotes.UI.IAudioVisualizer.Reset
member.summary: Will reset internal state of the visualizer, like if was stated from scratch

member.name: T:MusicNotes.UI.IconFont
member.summary: Generated by IconFont2Code: https://andreinitescu.github.io/IconFont2Code

member.name: T:MusicNotes.UI.SettingsButton
member.summary: Custom button for settings UI following the SkiaButton pattern. Handles all gestures directly in ProcessGestures (no base delegation). Supports pressed state (shadow + translation), hover state (border glow), and fluent chaining.

member.name: M:MusicNotes.UI.SettingsButton.ProcessGestures(DrawnUi.Draw.SkiaGesturesParameters,DrawnUi.Draw.GestureEventProcessingInfo)
member.summary: Handles all gestures directly, matching SkiaButton pattern (no base delegation).

member.name: M:MusicNotes.UI.SettingsButton.OnTapped(System.Action{MusicNotes.UI.SettingsButton})
member.summary: Register a tap callback. Instance method to route taps from the inner shape.

member.name: T:MusicNotes.UI.WrappingSmartLayout
member.summary: Layout that adapts to camera preview area and device orientation

member.name: T:MusicNotes.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
